subject: Bill charged twice
body: Hello, I noticed that I was charged twice this month, if this could be fixed asap, that would be great
summary: Customer was charged twice for their spending.

subject: How to stop auto pay
body: Hello, I want to stop my auto payment system, but I do not know how. If I could get some instructions, that would be great
summary: Customer wants directions for disabling auto payment system

subject: Inquiry about failed payment
body: My payment was failed, and I have no idea why. Can you check my account and see what is going on?
summary: Customer's payment was failed and wants to know reason behind it

subject: Cannot access account
body: I cannot access the paid feature of the website because my account was suspended. The reason is because the auto payment failed, but I do not know why. Could I get some insight into the issue?
summary: Customer's wants to know why their auto payment failed.

subject: Question about "Service Fee"
body: I am on your checkout page for the pro plan and I see a random 15 dollar service fee that I did not see anywhere. What is it? and can it be removed?
summary: Prospective customer disputing an unexpected service fee at checkout

subject: Refund for trial period
body: Hello, I paid for a subscription and used the service for about 6 days, and decided that I would like to cancel and get a refund.
summary: Customer wants to get a refund as they are cancelling subscription within trial period.

subject: Broken product
body: My product has an internal damage and would not function. I would like a refund of the product.
summary: Customer wants a refund for an interally damaged product.

subject: Subscription charge
body: I was planning to downgrade to the free tier, but forgot to do so. Could I get a refund for the subscription charge?
summary: Customer wants a refund for forgotten account downgrade.

subject: Poor experience
body: The subscription I paid for is very unenjoyable. I would like a refund for the price, while keeping the subscription. Shame on you!
summary: Customer requesting a full refund of their current subscription while maintaining the subscription itself

subject: Account Suspension
body: My account was suspended, but I was still charged for the subscription renewal, could I get a refund for that charge and get rid of the recurring payments?
summary: Customer wants a refund for their recent subscription renewal, and stop payment plan as their accuont is suspended.

subject: Subscription cost details
body: Hello, I was wondering if I could get a detailed breakdown of the subscription cost. I was charged an amount that I did not expect
summary: Customer wants detailed breakdown of their recent charge of an unexpected amount.
